DescribeTrace.action: The API name, current value is DescribeTrace
DescribeTrace.spanDatetime: Timestamp of any span in the trace. Either this field or beginDatetime/endDatetime is required; if spanDatetime is provided, beginDatetime/endDatetime will be ignored
DescribeTrace.beginDatetime: Start time in UTC. Either this field or spanDatetime is required
DescribeTrace.endDatetime: End time in UTC. Either this field or spanDatetime is required
DescribeTrace.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeTrace.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeTrace.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeTrace.returnHeight: Whether to return the height of each span in the waterfall chart. Default: false
